full_desc: If AACRITMET=1, then at least one of the following variables must be equal to 1: Q8a. CR1APET, Q8b. CR1PTAU217, Q8c. CR1PCPT217, Q8d. CR1PT181AB, Q8e. CR1TTABETA, Q8f. C1AB42AB40, Q8g. CR1OTH
test_logic: If AACRITMET=1 and CR1APET is blank and CR1PTAU217 is blank and CR1PCPT217 is blank and CR1PT181AB is blank and CR1TTABETA is blank and C1AB42AB40 is blank and CR1OTH is blank
comp_vars: AACRITMET, CR1APET, CR1PTAU217, CR1PCPT217, CR1PT181AB, CR1TTABETA, C1AB42AB40, CR1OTH

short_desc: If AACRITMET =1, then BIOSTAGE cannot be blank
full_desc: If Q7. AACRITMET (Did the participant meet the AA biological biomarker criteria for Alzheimer’s based on a positive Core 1 biomarker?) =1 (Yes), then Q9. BIOSTAGE (Select the biological stage of the participant) cannot be blank
test_logic: If AACRITMET =1 and BIOSTAGE=blank

short_desc: If AACRITMET = 0, then BIOSTAGE must be blank
full_desc: If Q7. AACRITMET (Did the participant meet the AA biological biomarker criteria for Alzheimer’s based on a positive Core 1 biomarker?) = 0 (No), then Q9. BIOSTAGE (Select the biological stage of the participant) must be blank
test_logic: If AACRITMET= 0 and BIOSTAGE is not blank

short_desc: BIOSTAGE must be an integer between 1 - 3, or 9
full_desc: Q9. BIOSTAGE (Select the biological stage of the participant) must be an integer between 1 and 3, or 9 (Unknown)
test_logic: IF BIOSTAGE < 1 or (BIOSTAGE > 3 and ne 9)

short_desc: If AACRITMET =1, then CLINSTAGE cannot be blank
full_desc: If Q7. AACRITMET (Did the participant meet the AA biological biomarker criteria for Alzheimer’s based on a positive Core 1 biomarker?) =1 (Yes), then Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) cannot be blank
test_logic: If AACRITMET =1 and CLINSTAGE=blank

short_desc: If AACRITMET = 0, then CLINSTAGE must be blank
full_desc: If Q7. AACRITMET (Did the participant meet the AA biological biomarker criteria for Alzheimer’s based on a positive Core 1 biomarker?) = 0 (No), then Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) must be blank
test_logic: If AACRITMET= 0 and CLINSTAGE is not blank

short_desc: CLINSTAGE must be an integer between 0 - 6, or 9
full_desc: Q10. CLINSTAGE (Clinical AD stage) must be an integer between 0 and 6, or 9 (Unknown)
test_logic: IF CLINSTAGE < 0 or (CLINSTAGE > 6 and ne 9)
